# External Skill Registry

This file mirrors references/external-skills.md.
Inspect third-party SKILL.md files before using their scripts or hooks.

- OpenAI Codex skills docs: https://developers.openai.com/codex/skills
- OpenAI skills catalog: https://github.com/openai/skills
- Addy Osmani agent-skills catalog: https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills

| Skill | Provider | Required | Phase | Link | Install/use hint | Purpose |
|---|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| `OpenAI Codex Agent Skills docs` | openai-docs | yes | registration | https://developers.openai.com/codex/skills | `Read only; not installed as a skill.` | Canonical skill format, save locations, activation behavior, and registration guidance. |
| `Codex Subagents docs` | openai-docs | yes | subagents | https://developers.openai.com/codex/subagents | `Read only; not installed as a skill.` | Parallel subagent workflow design and delegation constraints. |
| `Codex AGENTS.md docs` | openai-docs | yes | context | https://developers.openai.com/codex/guides/agents-md | `Read only; not installed as a skill.` | Project instruction discovery and persistent repository guidance. |
| `Codex GitHub code review docs` | openai-docs | optional | review-comments | https://developers.openai.com/codex/integrations/github | `Read only; not installed as a skill.` | Codex GitHub review behavior and review guideline grounding. |
| `OpenAI skills catalog` | openai | yes | installation | https://github.com/openai/skills | `$skill-installer <skill-name> or $skill-installer install <GitHub directory URL>` | Official catalog for curated/system/experimental Codex skills. |
| `skill-creator` | openai | optional | skill-authoring | https://github.com/openai/skills/blob/main/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md | `$skill-installer skill-creator when not already installed.` | Create or refine custom skills. |
| `gh-address-comments` | openai | yes | review-comments | https://github.com/openai/skills/blob/main/skills/.curated/gh-address-comments/SKILL.md | `$skill-installer gh-address-comments` | Read unresolved GitHub PR review comments and convert accepted feedback into TODOs. |
| `define-goal` | openai | yes | goal-definition | https://github.com/openai/skills/blob/main/skills/.curated/define-goal/SKILL.md | `$skill-installer define-goal` | Turn broad requirements into measurable objectives, constraints, and stop conditions. |
| `create-plan` | openai-experimental | optional | planning | https://github.com/openai/skills/blob/main/skills/.experimental/create-plan/SKILL.md | `$skill-installer install https://github.com/openai/skills/tree/main/skills/.experimental/create-plan` | Create a structured implementation plan before TODO creation; experimental output must be reviewed critically. |
| `openai-docs` | openai | optional | source-grounding | https://github.com/openai/skills/blob/main/skills/.curated/openai-docs/SKILL.md | `$skill-installer openai-docs` | Ground OpenAI API, Codex, and Agents SDK decisions in official OpenAI docs. |
| `agentic-rag` | ch040602 | optional | companion-rag | C:/Users/hcslab_523/.codex/skills/agentic-rag | `Use the local installed Codex skill at C:/Users/hcslab_523/.codex/skills/agentic-rag.` | Optional companion skill for Agentic RAG, cross-corpus retrieval, context sufficiency, query rewriting, and grounded synthesis TODOs inside RDD workflows. |
| `using-agent-skills` | addyosmani/agent-skills | optional | skill-selection | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/using-agent-skills/SKILL.md | `Install or reference this SKILL.md after inspection.` | Meta skill selection and phase mapping. |
| `spec-driven-development` | addyosmani/agent-skills | optional | requirements | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/spec-driven-development/SKILL.md | `Install or reference this SKILL.md after inspection.` | Turn requirements into a concrete spec before code. |
| `source-driven-development` | addyosmani/agent-skills | yes | source-grounding | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/source-driven-development/SKILL.md | `Install or reference this SKILL.md after inspection.` | Ground framework/library decisions in official documentation and source evidence. |
| `planning-and-task-breakdown` | addyosmani/agent-skills | yes | planning | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/planning-and-task-breakdown/SKILL.md | `Install or reference this SKILL.md after inspection.` | Break specs into small verifiable TODOs with acceptance criteria and dependencies. |
| `incremental-implementation` | addyosmani/agent-skills | yes | implementation | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/incremental-implementation/SKILL.md | `Install or reference this SKILL.md after inspection.` | Implement one thin vertical slice at a time with safe defaults. |
| `test-driven-development` | addyosmani/agent-skills or local installed skill | yes | validation | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/test-driven-development/SKILL.md | `Use the already installed local test-driven-development skill, or inspect/install this linked SKILL.md.` | Use red-green-refactor and test evidence for each TODO. |
| `debugging-and-error-recovery` | addyosmani/agent-skills | yes | debugging | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/debugging-and-error-recovery/SKILL.md | `Install or reference this SKILL.md after inspection.` | Reproduce, localize, reduce, fix, and guard after validation failure. |
| `code-review-and-quality` | addyosmani/agent-skills | yes | review | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/code-review-and-quality/SKILL.md | `Install or reference this SKILL.md after inspection.` | Run multi-axis review before accepting a TODO or merge. |
| `documentation-and-adrs` | addyosmani/agent-skills | yes | documentation | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/documentation-and-adrs/SKILL.md | `Install or reference this SKILL.md after inspection.` | Document architecture decisions, APIs, behavior changes, and rationale. |
| `code-simplification` | addyosmani/agent-skills | optional | improvement | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/code-simplification/SKILL.md | `Install or reference this SKILL.md after inspection.` | Preserve behavior while reducing complexity and maintenance cost. |
| `security-and-hardening` | addyosmani/agent-skills | optional | security-review | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/security-and-hardening/SKILL.md | `Install or reference this SKILL.md after inspection.` | Review auth, user input, secrets, dependency, and data handling risks. |
| `performance-optimization` | addyosmani/agent-skills | optional | performance-review | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/performance-optimization/SKILL.md | `Install or reference this SKILL.md after inspection.` | Run measure-first performance critique and improvement planning. |
| `api-and-interface-design` | addyosmani/agent-skills | optional | interface-review | https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills/blob/main/skills/api-and-interface-design/SKILL.md | `Install or reference this SKILL.md after inspection.` | API boundary and interface critique. |
